message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "读者" as Reader
actor "图书管理员" as Librarian
rectangle "还书界面" as ReturnUI
rectangle "还书信息" as BookInfo
rectangle "系统" as System

box "loop" #LightGrey
    Reader -> Librarian: 1.取消预定
    activate Librarian
    Librarian -> ReturnUI: 2.处理图书
    activate ReturnUI
    ReturnUI -> BookInfo: 3.获取图书信息
    activate BookInfo
    BookInfo --> ReturnUI: 4.图书信息
    deactivate BookInfo
    ReturnUI -> System: 5.删除预定记录
    activate System
    System -> System: 6.删除预定记录
    System --> ReturnUI: 7.删除预定成功
    deactivate System
    ReturnUI --> Librarian: 8.处理图成功
    deactivate ReturnUI
    Librarian --> Reader: 9.取消预定成功
    deactivate Librarian
end box

@enduml
```
